message:
Fix vsock implementation and security issues

- Implement proper vsock support using mdlayher/vsock package instead of
  stub that always fails
- Fix command injection vulnerability in cloud-init template by properly
  quoting CloneRepo value
- Fix setup-claude-hooks.sh to run as vscode user instead of root
- Update Go version to 1.22 to match Dockerfile

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,7 +75,7 @@ runcmd:
   - mkdir -p /etc/stockyard
 
   # Set up Claude Code hooks for vscode user
-  - /usr/local/bin/setup-claude-hooks.sh
+  - su - vscode -c "/usr/local/bin/setup-claude-hooks.sh"
 
   # Start stockyard init service
   - systemctl daemon-reload
@@ -89,7 +89,7 @@ runcmd:
 
 {{- if .CloneRepo }}
   # Clone the repository
-  - su - vscode -c "git clone {{ .CloneRepo }} /home/vscode/workspace"
+  - su - vscode -c "git clone '{{ .CloneRepo }}' /home/vscode/workspace"
   - chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/workspace
 {{- end }}

@@ -1,3 +1,12 @@
 module stockyard-snapshot
 
-go 1.21
+go 1.22
+
+require github.com/mdlayher/vsock v1.2.1
+
+require (
+	github.com/mdlayher/socket v0.4.1 // indirect
+	golang.org/x/net v0.9.0 // indirect
+	golang.org/x/sync v0.1.0 // indirect
+	golang.org/x/sys v0.7.0 // indirect
+)
